title: veronica spicata var. bellidifolia
intro: Veronica spicata var. bellidifolia, also known as Bellflower Veronica, is a flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Veronica spicata var. bellidifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
